card.title: NAD+
card.description: NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell and involved in essential metabolic processes. NAD+ plays a central role in converting nutrients into energy, supporting cellular repair, and maintaining overall metabolic function. Natural levels of NAD+ have been observed to decline with age.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Supports Healthy Aging
benefits.description: Involved in pathways related to DNA repair, mitochondrial function, and cellular resilience.

benefits.title: Supports Brain Health
benefits.description: Studied for its role in neuronal signaling, cognitive pathways, and metabolic activity in the brain.

benefits.title: Cellular Energy Support
benefits.description: Plays a role in mitochondrial energy production and cellular metabolism.

quotes.quote: “Conquer has absolutely changed my life. I came to them feeling completely unwell and confused as to why I wasn’t getting answers from my regular doctors. I wanted more health and energy and struggled for so long to believe that was possible. Since starting with Conquer 3 months ago – taking their supplement protocols, injections like B12, NAD, and GLP1 for my wellness, plus the small lifestyle changes they suggested, I have had COMPLETE shifts in my life. My marriage is happier than ever, my energy is more substantial, and my relationship with my body for the first time feels healthy – something I have NEVER had.”
quotes.author: Lauren Eliz Love

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is NAD+?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: How is NAD+ administered?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: How long until I feel the benefits of NAD+?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: Your care team includes qualified clinicians and support staff who guide you through onboarding, treatment, and progress tracking.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
